Brigade.title: Brigade
Brigade.description: Represents a brigade, the highest level unit managing templates and overall readiness.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Brigade entity.

Battalion.title: Battalion
Battalion.description: Represents a battalion, reporting readiness status to a brigade.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Battalion entity.

templateId.description: Reference to the Template this battalion should adhere to.

Company.title: Company
Company.description: Represents a company within a battalion.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Company entity.

Platoon.title: Platoon
Platoon.description: Represents a platoon within a company.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Platoon entity.

Squad.title: Squad
Squad.description: Represents a squad (Kita) within a platoon.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Squad entity.

name.description: Name or number of the squad (e.g., 'כיתה א').

Soldier.title: Soldier
Soldier.description: Represents a single soldier within a squad.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Soldier entity.

role.description: The soldier's role in the squad (e.g., 'נגביסט').

fireteam.description: The fireteam (Chulia) the soldier belongs to (e.g., 'חוד', 'רתק').

positionInTeam.description: The soldier's number or position within the fireteam.

equipment.description: List of equipment assigned to the soldier.

gap.description: Description of any readiness gap (e.g., 'חסר הסמכה').

Template.title: Template
Template.description: Defines the required roles, authorizations, and equipment for a specific unit type.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Template entity.

Role.title: Role
Role.description: Represents a role defined within a template.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Role entity.

Personnel.title: Personnel
Personnel.description: Represents a member of the personnel, assigned to a specific role within a battalion.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Personnel entity.

roleId.description: Reference to the specific Role this person fills from the assigned template. (Relationship: Role 1:1 Personnel)

GapAnalysis.title: GapAnalysis
GapAnalysis.description: Represents the discrepancies between the template and actual status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the GapAnalysis entity.

analysisDate.description: Date the gap analysis was performed.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed to support the TroopSync application's core features, focusing on template management, automated gap analysis, battalion reporting, role assignment, and user authentication/authorization. The structure prioritizes authorization independence by denormalizing authorization-related data. The design employs structural segregation to ensure homogeneous security postures within collections. Access modeling leverages path-based ownership and membership maps for collaborative data. To support the detailed platoon view, 'Squad' and 'Soldier' entities were added, nested under their respective parent units to maintain the hierarchical data model and simplify security rules. All access inherits from brigade membership, ensuring data is properly siloed. The addition of the GapAnalysis entity and its corresponding path allows for storing the results of comparing a battalion's status against a template, which is a key feature. The Personnel entity now includes a roleId to explicitly link a person to a template role, enabling the core workflow of assigning personnel to fulfill template requirements.
